## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between AfterShoot and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, workflow optimization, and conversion improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New workflow improvements (keyword approval, outline reviews) should streamline content production](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [Focus on balancing photographer-specific content with broader topics that can attract relevant traffic](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [TOFU content has been converting well; need to strategically integrate product mentions](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Team to analyze conversion data to inform future content strategy and topic selection](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
